chapter_title.en: Amīr al-mu’minīn's declaration of truth and steadfastness

text: ١٨٥. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَا كَذَبْتُ وَلَا كُذِّبْتُ، وَلَا ضَلَلْتُ وَلَا ضُلَّ بِي.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 185. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: I have neither spoken a lie nor have I been told a lie. I have neither deviated nor have I been made to deviate (others).
